title: Paints, varnishes and lacquers
description: Paints, varnishes and lacquers for industry, handicrafts and arts, including protective, decorative and functional surface coatings applied to wood, metal, masonry and other substrates.
keywords: oil paints for use in art
undercoating for vehicle chassis / undersealing for vehicle chassis
watercolour paints for use in art / watercolor paints for use in art

title: Preservatives against rust and against deterioration of wood
description: Preparations for protection against corrosion and for preservation of wood, including anti-rust products, anti-tarnishing preparations and wood preservation compositions.
keywords: oils for the preservation of wood

title: Colorants and dyes
description: Colorants, dyes, dyestuffs and pigments for industrial, artistic and food-related applications, including substances used for colouring materials, clothing, beverages and other products.
keywords: colourings for beer / colorings for beer
colourings for beverages / colorings for beverages
colourings for butter / colorings for butter
colourings for liqueurs / colorings for liqueurs
malt caramel [food colouring] / malt caramel [food coloring]

title: Inks for printing, marking and engraving
description: Inks for printing, marking and engraving purposes, including printer inks, marking inks, engraving inks and related filled cartridges and toners.
keywords: edible ink cartridges, filled, for printers
ink cartridges, filled, for printers and photocopiers
toner cartridges, filled, for printers and photocopiers

title: Raw natural resins
description: Natural resins in raw form used in varnishes, lacquers, coatings and related preparations.

title: Metals in foil and powder form for use in painting, decorating, printing and art
description: Metals in foil and powder form intended for use in painting, decorating, printing and artistic applications.
keywords: metal foil for use in painting, decorating, printing and art
metals in powder form for use in painting, decorating, printing and art

title: Auxiliary preparations for paints, varnishes and lacquers
description: Preparations used in connection with paints, varnishes and lacquers, including thinners, thickeners, fixatives and siccatives.
keywords: binding preparations for paints / agglutinants for paints
fixatives for watercolours / fixatives for watercolors
masking fluid for use in watercolour painting / masking fluid for use in watercolor painting
stains for leather / mordants for leather
colorants for the restoration of furniture in the form of markers
